ItacPersonItem.Notes: Also member of Roman Academies Affumicati, and Divisi. See O. Michel, and L. Rossi, `Briccio, Giovanni`, in DBI. Portrait is from Bricci, La Tartarea ... comedia infernale (Viterbo, 1614).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
